name: Cost Management
description: Leverage the power of Pliant's integrations and automation capabilities to reduce costs and plan your budget, run complex operations and align your financial goals.

entries.name: Create MySQL Table from Salesforce Object Metadata
entries.path: Create MySQL Table from Salesforce Object Metadata.zip
entries.description: Reads the metadata for a given Salesforce.com object and renders a CREATE TABLE statement to create a table in MySQL. Salesforce data types are changed to the corresponding types as closely as possible. Inter-object references are currently skipped.
